facts.fact: The 3DS2 strong authentication integration was rolled back on 2024-01-08 due to a 23% cart abandonment spike in the first 6 hours of rollout
Stripe's updated enterprise pricing tier adds 0.15% to all transactions over $10,000, effective 2024-02-01, not reflected in the Q1 revenue model
The idempotency key fix shipped in v2.8.1 applies only to new transaction records, not to retries of transactions created before 2024-01-01
Payment processor contract renewal is due 2024-03-12, not Q2 as stated in the roadmap; late renewal triggers a 48-hour service interruption window
